title: Need the ability to send a text in a sequence.

posts.author: katynabunn (Katyna Bunn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Sequences in my previous real estate CRM with Keller Williams were called SmartPlans. With the move to Monday.com, I have lost the ability to send template text messages within a sequence via Twilio. I would greatly appreciate it if this feature could reduce the time we spend manually following up via text.

What are you trying to achieve

Increase client engagement/touches.
